series_metadata.series_title: IGR Invoices and Final Assessment Invoices
series_metadata.series_description: Yearly IGR (Intrastate Gross Revenues)Invoice verifications and Final assessment letters are mailed by OCC to utility companies: May; 50% payment invoice and Sept; Final Assessment invoices. Both are used to define Intrastate General Reciepts Revenue from utility companies.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy of verification letters for 4 years then destroy. ; Electronic: Information from the IGR Invoices and Final Assessment Invoices are added to the OCC''''''''s yearly Calculation of Utility Assessments and retained in the OCC electronic system for 7 years., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
